moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The world-famous Wimbledon Championships begin their main draw on Monday, June 29th, bringing two weeks of top-tier tennis action to SW19.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries, cream, and world-class tennis! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off its main draw on Monday. Who are you backing for the trophy?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The buzz is building across London! Wimbledon's main tournament starts Monday, bringing all the action to our doorstep. Are you heading to SW19 or watching from home?

angles.name: Qualifiers Wrap
angles.copy: The qualifying rounds are done! The main draw for Wimbledon 2026 begins Monday. What's been the biggest surprise in the lead-up so far?

moments.title: Glastonbury on a Break
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival is taking a planned 'fallow year' in 2026, meaning no festival will be held at Worthy Farm this summer.

angles.name: No Glasto This Year
angles.copy: Missing the mud and music? Just a reminder that Glastonbury Festival is taking its traditional fallow year in 2026. Time to plan for 2027!

angles.name: Fallow Year Plans
angles.copy: No Glastonbury this year, as Worthy Farm gets a well-deserved rest. What are your alternative festival plans for summer 2026?

moments.title: Benson Boone turns 24
moments.blurb: American pop singer-songwriter Benson Boone, known for hits like 'Beautiful Things,' celebrates his 24th birthday today, June 25th.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 24th birthday to Benson Boone! Kicking off the day with 'Beautiful Things' to celebrate.

angles.name: New Gen Hitmaker
angles.copy: He's only 24 today, but Benson Boone is already making massive waves! Wishing a very happy birthday to the 'Beautiful Things' singer.

moments.title: Carly Simon turns 83
moments.blurb: Legendary American singer-songwriter Carly Simon, famous for 'You're So Vain' and 'Nobody Does It Better,' celebrates her 83rd birthday today, June 25th.

angles.name: Classic Singer B'day
angles.copy: Anticipating a great day! Happy 83rd birthday to the iconic Carly Simon, the voice behind so many classic hits.

angles.name: You're So Vain
angles.copy: She probably thinks this post is about her... and it is! Happy Birthday to the incredible Carly Simon, 83 today.

moments.title: Ariana Grande turns 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday tomorrow, June 26th.

angles.name: Pop Princess B'day
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Ariana Grande turns 33 tomorrow. What's your favourite track from the pop queen?

angles.name: Tomorrow's Pop Icon
angles.copy: 33 years young tomorrow! Wishing an early happy birthday to the phenomenal Ariana Grande. We'll be playing her biggest hits all day!

moments.title: Mick Jones turns 71
moments.blurb: Mick Jones, co-founder, guitarist, and vocalist of iconic punk rock band The Clash, celebrates his 71st birthday tomorrow, June 26th.

angles.name: Punk Legend B'day
angles.copy: Should I stay or should I go? We're staying to wish a very happy 71st birthday to The Clash legend, Mick Jones, tomorrow!

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 71st to Mick Jones of The Clash tomorrow! A true rock icon whose influence still resonates today. What's your favourite Clash anthem?

moments.title: Bruce Johnston turns 84
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, long-standing member of The Beach Boys and Grammy-winning songwriter, celebrates his 84th birthday on June 27th.

angles.name: Beach Boys B'day
angles.copy: Good vibrations for Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys, turning 84 on June 27th! Celebrate with some summer classics.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: From 'California Girls' to 'I Write the Songs', Bruce Johnston's contributions are immense. Happy 84th to a true music legend on Saturday!

moments.title: Ian Paice turns 78
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and only continuous member of hard rock pioneers Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday on June 29th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Smoke on the water, fire in the drums! Happy 78th birthday to Deep Purple's legendary stickman, Ian Paice, this Saturday!

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to rock royalty, Ian Paice of Deep Purple, on June 29th. Still rocking harder than anyone!

moments.title: Cheryl Cole turns 43
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cheryl Cole, known for her work with Girls Aloud and successful solo career, celebrates her 43rd birthday on June 30th.

angles.name: Girls Aloud Star
angles.copy: Sound of the underground! Happy 43rd birthday to the incredible Cheryl Cole on Sunday. What's your favourite Girls Aloud hit?

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: From pop group to solo star, Cheryl has done it all! Wishing a very happy 43rd birthday to the Geordie pop queen this Sunday.

moments.title: Debbie Harry turns 81
moments.blurb: The iconic lead singer of Blondie, Debbie Harry, known for her groundbreaking influence on new wave and pop, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: One way or another, we're celebrating! Happy 81st birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry of Blondie on July 1st.

angles.name: New Wave Queen
angles.copy: The ultimate new wave queen turns 81 on Monday! Debbie Harry's style and sound remain unmatched. What's your top Blondie track?

moments.title: Missy Elliott turns 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy 'Misdemeanor' Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Work it! Happy 55th birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott on July 1st. A true innovator in music!

angles.name: Music Game Changer
angles.copy: She's been changing the game for decades! Wishing a very happy 55th to Missy Elliott this Monday. What's your favourite Missy moment?

moments.title: Burna Boy turns 35
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar Burna Boy, a leading figure in Afrobeats, celebrates his 35th birthday on July 2nd.

angles.name: Afrobeats Star B'day
angles.copy: Big congratulations to Burna Boy, celebrating his 35th birthday on July 2nd! Get ready to dance to his hits.

angles.name: Global Icon
angles.copy: The African Giant turns 35 on Tuesday! Wishing a very happy birthday to the incredible Burna Boy. Which track is your favourite?

moments.title: Shane Lynch turns 50
moments.blurb: Shane Lynch, member of Irish boyband Boyzone, reaches a milestone 50th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Boyband Milestone
angles.copy: No matter what, we're celebrating! Happy 50th birthday to Boyzone's Shane Lynch on July 3rd.

angles.name: Pop Heartthrob
angles.copy: From boyband heartthrob to reality star, Shane Lynch hits the big 5-0 on Thursday! Send your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Vince Clarke turns 66
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, co-founder of Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth Pop Genius
angles.copy: Just Can't Get Enough of his music! Happy 66th birthday to synth-pop genius Vince Clarke on July 3rd. Which of his bands is your favourite?

angles.name: Electronic Visionary
angles.copy: An electronic music visionary turns 66 on Thursday! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, Vince Clarke's impact is undeniable.

moments.title: Post Malone turns 31
moments.blurb: Multi-genre superstar Post Malone, known for blending hip-hop, pop, and rock, celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Genre-Bending B'day
angles.copy: Cheers to Posty! Post Malone turns 31 on July 4th. What's your go-to track from this genre-bending artist?

angles.name: Hip Hop Rock Star
angles.copy: From 'Rockstar' to 'Circles,' he does it all! Happy 31st birthday to Post Malone this Friday. Let's blast his biggest hits!
